content.en:
Subsequently, Ye Tian began to condense the fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

As long as the transcendent power reaches the Dacheng realm, it will inevitably be able to condense the fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, which is a 100% success rate.

I saw that Ye Tian condensed the fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit in the Eternal Dao Seed with the power of the Great Adult Transcendent Dimension, and as time passed, the fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit gradually condensed.

After the fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit was condensed, Ye Tian's cultivation began to break through, and his physical body began to transform.

After a long time, Ye Tian's transformation was completed.

At this moment, his strength skyrocketed a lot.

"With my current strength, I can definitely easily defeat those three half-step extradimensional realms, and I don't need to use the fragments of extradimensional dao soldiers!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After the breakthrough in cultivation, he began to refine his Eternal Dao Seed again.

Outcome.

The tempering is not moving!

Even if he used the power of the Great Adult Transcendent Dimension, it would be difficult to refine his Eternal Dao Species.

"It's the limit!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In fact, it is estimated that it has never been possible to condense the Eternal Realm Spirit to as much as the fifteenth, so even the Garan Chamber of Commerce does not know that after condensing the fifteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, it will not be able to refine the 960 Eternal Dao kinds.

"I was thinking of raising the power of the transcendent dimension to the consummation realm, refining the Eternal Dao seed to the limit, and condensing the sixteenth Eternal Realm Spirit, but now it seems that there is no hope!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he was also very satisfied, after all, he was the only peak realm god who could have such a deep foundation.

So, he prepared to attack the half-step extradimensional realm.

Becoming a half-step transcendent realm is to cultivate the method of transcending the Dao species, so that the eternal Dao species can transform into a superdimensional Dao species.

And he had already created the perfect extradimensional Dao Seed, the Stonepan Dao Seed.

Of course.

The Extreme Yang Realm and the Treasure Refining Realm are not suitable places to break through, and if they are interfered with by other powerhouses, it will not be good.

After all, according to his understanding, the transformation of the Eternal Dao Seed into the Extra-Dimensional Dao Seed would take at least a Extra-Dimensional Era time, which was a long time.

Therefore, he was still preparing to break through in the Endless Seam Realm, which was the Terran lair, and the territory of 7362 was very weak, and almost no enemies would descend there.

The only enemy of the human race is currently the Ice Ghost Organization, but where does the Ice Ghost Organization dare to provoke him now!

......

The Bounds of the Endless Seams.

It was here that Ye Tian began to cultivate the Stone Pan Dao Species.

With the inheritance of the perfect extra-dimensional Dao species, and the power of the great adult super-dimensional, it is naturally very easy for Ye Tian to break through.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian manipulated the power of the Great Adult level super-dimensional to pour into his Eternal Dao Species, and according to the cultivation method of the Shipan Dao Seed, he began to promote the transformation of the Eternal Dao Seed into a super-dimensional Dao Species.

With the passage of time, the Eternal Dao Species began to gradually metamorphose, from the Eternal Dao Species to the Extra-Dimensional Dao Species.

This transformation is long and resource-intensive.

Ye Tian refined a variety of extradimensional resources obtained in the past and integrated them into the Eternal Dao Species.

Fortunately, the resources consumed are not too much, and he can still support it.

Ye Tian originally thought that it would take him a superdimensional era to break through, but the power of the Dacheng-level extradimensional power shortened this time.

A third of the extradimensional era years later, Ye Tian felt that his Eternal Dao Seed was about to completely transform into a Transcendent Dao Seed, the Shimapan Dao Seed.

Really.

this day.

The Stone Pan Dao species was condensed, and Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed by more than ten times.

At this moment, the power in his body is transforming into the power of the half-step transcendent realm, and even the superdimensional heart domain has skyrocketed, and the superdimensional power has also transformed, and he has grown a little bit in the Dacheng realm, and he is not even very far away from the power of the consummation-level superdimension.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation was truly stable.

......

"Finally reached the half-step extradimensional realm!"

This was the (cadg) realm that Ye Tian had dreamed of, and now it was easily reached.

And according to the knowledge purchased, after reaching the half-step extradimensional realm, it is necessary to transform the physical body into a superdimensional body. Only by combining the extra-dimensional Dao species with the extra-dimensional body can one truly transform into the extra-dimensional realm.

However, the transformation of the extradimensional body is too difficult and extremely time-consuming.

If a half-step extradimensional realm has a stable foundation and no sequelae, and wants to complete the transformation of the superdimensional body with entry-level extradimensional power, let alone a hundred extradimensional eras, even a thousand extradimensional epochs will not be enough!

But as long as you keep cultivating and make progress little by little, tens of thousands of extra-dimensional epochs can't do it, then continue to cultivate, and one day you will be able to complete a breakthrough.

This is also the reason why it is said that as long as the foundation of the half-step extradimensional realm is fine, it will inevitably break through.

However, who wants to spend endless years to break through, they all want to break through quickly.

And opening up the extra-dimensional heart domain is a way to accelerate the breakthrough, and using the power of the small and large super-dimensional levels can naturally make the super-dimensional body more quickly.

For example, Ye Tian, the power of the transcendent dimension has reached the realm of Dacheng, and he can naturally refine the superdimensional body faster, and he naturally does not need to take too long.

But the fastest way to break through is to temper the power of the superdimensional to the realm of perfection.

Of course, if you can obtain some extra-dimensional resources that assist in refining the extra-dimensional body, then the breakthrough speed can naturally be accelerated.

"I'll try to refine the superdimensional body with the power of the Great Adult level first, how will the effect be!"

Ye Tian began to use the power of the Great Dimensional Dimension to hook up the Transcendent Dao Species, and then used the pure energy of the Transcendental Dao Species to refine the flesh, trying to refine the physical body into a transcendent body little by little.

However, after a while, Ye Tian frowned.

"The speed of refining is very slow, it should be that my physical body is far beyond those half-step extradimensional realms, and if I want to transform such a terrifying physical body into a superdimensional body, the difficulty is no more difficult than that of other half-step extradimensional realms. "

"With my current refining speed, it is impossible to break through in a thousand extradimensional eras, and the power of the great adult level is still not enough, and the power of the superdimensional must be refined to the consummation realm. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he took out a drop of immortal golden pith in an attempt to temper his extradimensional power.

Outcome.

"It's useless!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

The power of the extradimensional dimension has reached the realm of Dacheng, which is already extremely powerful, and the golden pith of immortality is naturally of little use.

Unless he could find a replacement for the Golden Marrow of Immortality, he might not be able to find it.

......

this day.

Ye Tian replaced the replica bodies of the Extreme Yang Realm and the Treasure Refining Realm with the half-step Transcendent Dimensional Realm, and then went to the Garan Chamber of Commerce.

He wanted to see if the Garan Chamber of Commerce had any resources to replace the golden pith of immortality, and if there were, and it was useful to him, he naturally wanted to buy it.
